hero.title: Plan any event end-to-end in one platform.
hero.subtitle: Discover verified suppliers, send one request to many, compare quotes, and book with a digital contract — all in Sevent.

items.title: One request, many quotes
items.body: Send a structured RFQ once. We match you with the right approved suppliers for your category, city, and date.

items.title: Compare on more than price
items.body: See line items, inclusions, travel fees, and verified reviews side-by-side so the right choice is obvious.

items.title: A platform you can rely on
items.body: Verified suppliers, click-to-agree digital contracts, and every booking tracked end-to-end.

landing.comingSoon: The pilot is opening to Riyadh + Jeddah suppliers now.

onboarding.title: Supplier onboarding
onboarding.intro: Complete three quick steps: business info, verification documents, and where you operate. Our team reviews every submission before your public profile goes live.
onboarding.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.submittedForReview: Profile submitted for review. You will receive an email once an admin reviews your documents.
onboarding.bioHint: Two or three sentences describing the work you do. Shown on your public profile.
onboarding.step2RequireFile: Attach a file to each document row, then continue.
onboarding.serviceAreaHint: Comma-separated list, e.g. Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam.
onboarding.capacityHint: Optional peak capacity you can service in a single event.
onboarding.concurrentLimitHint: How many bookings can overlap on the same date.
onboarding.subcategoriesHint: Select every sub-service you can fulfil. Organizers filter on these.

calendar.title: Availability
calendar.subtitle: Read-only month view of every block on your calendar. Use the form below to add, edit, or remove manual blocks.
calendar.conflict: This range conflicts with another block or booking. Pick a different window.

verifications.title: Verifications queue
verifications.subtitle: Review supplier documents, approve or reject each application, and notify the supplier by email.
verifications.notesPlaceholder: Explain what needs to be fixed before resubmitting.
verifications.docNotesPlaceholder: What is wrong or missing with this document?
verifications.approveSummary: Approving sets verification_status=approved, is_published=true, marks all non-rejected documents as approved, sends the welcome email and writes a supplier.approved notification.
verifications.rejectSummary: Rejecting sets verification_status=rejected, hides the listing, marks every non-approved document as rejected with the notes you provide, and emails the supplier the next steps.
verifications.errorAdminRequired: Admin role required to view this page.

supplier.noPackages: This supplier has not published any packages yet.
